data.name: Horse Magic
data.detailed_description:
Horse Magic is a narrative-rich, choice-driven Visual Novel centered on the evolving relationship between two college roommates, Kaiah and Iris. From their first semester, these best friends have shared joys, stresses, and future aspirations. Their days revolve around classes, late-night cram sessions, and spontaneous hangouts—until a single, inexplicable occurrence rocks Kaiah’s world and alters her path forever. What initially seems like a freak accident soon spirals into a moral labyrinth where her every decision feels weighted by potential heartbreak, hidden truths, and forbidden desire.

As Kaiah confronts the surreal shift in her reality, she begins to question the very nature of her identity, her impulses, and the role her closest companion plays in this life-altering twist. Determined to uncover whether this phenomenon is a grievous affliction or a fortuitous gift, she navigates delicate emotional terrain, torn between the security of the familiar and the lure of the unknown. Throughout her quest for answers, Iris remains steadfastly by her side—though even this unwavering loyalty may be tested as deeper, more intimate feelings surface.

As she grapples with the consequences, one question lingers: Is this a curse disrupting her life… or the silver lining she never saw coming?

data.short_description: Horse Magic is a choice-driven visual novel about Kaiah and her roommate Iris, whose bond is tested by a surreal event. Navigate love, identity, and forbidden desire through branching choices, emotional drama, and futa-themed intimacy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
